query:
SELECT 
  cr.election_year,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cr.id) as candidatos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM zone_results zr WHERE zr.candidate_id = cr.id LIMIT 1) as sample
FROM candidate_results cr
GROUP BY cr.election_year
ORDER BY cr.election_year;

SELECT 
  election_year,
  COUNT(*) as total_zonas
FROM zone_results
GROUP BY election_year
ORDER BY election_year;

SELECT 
  election_year,
  COUNT(*) as total_cands,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cpf IS NOT NULL AND cpf != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_cpf
FROM candidate_results
GROUP BY election_year
ORDER BY election_year;
